schema.description: A validation rule applied to a field after parsing

ruleId.description: Unique identifier for this rule within the spec

field.description: Name of the field this rule applies to

value.description: Primary comparison value (e.g. min value, regex pattern, allowed list)

message.description: Human-readable error message when the rule fails

severity.description: Severity level of a validation error
severity.title: Severity

schema.title: ValidationRule
